# Anthropic

> Anthropic is an AI safety company that builds Claude, a family of large language models for reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI.

## Claude
- [Claude Sonnet 4.6 \ Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/claude/sonnet): Hybrid reasoning model with superior intelligence for agents, featuring a 1M context window
- [Claude Opus 4.7 \ Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/claude/opus): Hybrid reasoning model that pushes the frontier for coding and AI agents, featuring a 1M context window
- [Claude Haiku 4.5 \ Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/claude/haiku): Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.

## News
- [Newsroom \ Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/news): Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.
- [Announcing our updated Responsible Scaling Policy \ Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/news/announcing-our-updated-responsible-scaling-policy): Today we are publishing a significant update to our Responsible Scaling Policy (RSP), the risk governance framework we use to mitigate potential catastrophic ri
- [Widening the conversation on frontier AI \ Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/news/widening-conversation-ai): Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.
- [Anthropic appoints KiYoung Choi as Representative Director of Korea \ Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/news/kiyoung-choi-representative-director-anthropic-korea): KiYoung Choi is joining Anthropic as Representative Director of Korea, ahead of the opening of our Seoul office.
- [Anthropic co-founder Chris Olah's remarks on Pope Leo XIV's encyclical "Magnifica humanitas" \ Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/news/chris-olah-pope-leo-encyclical): The full text of Chris Olah's remarks on the Pope's encyclical on AI

## Product
- [Anthropic's agentic solution for vulnerability detection | Claude Security \ Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/product/security): Claude Security finds vulnerabilities and proposes fixes by reasoning about code, not by pattern-matching.
- [Claude Code | Anthropic's agentic coding system \ Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/product/claude-code): Claude Code is Anthropic's agentic coding system that operates across an entire project to understand codebases, execute multi-file changes, and complete develo
- [Claude Cowork | Anthropic’s agentic AI for knowledge work \ Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/product/claude-cowork): Claude Cowork is a system built by Anthropic that executes multi-step knowledge work on a user's behalf, including research synthesis, document preparation, and
- [Anthropic’s enterprise offering | Claude Enterprise \ Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/product/enterprise): Claude Enterprise is Anthropic's plan for deploying Claude organization-wide with the governance, data controls, and admin infrastructure IT and security teams

- [The Briefing: Financial Services \ Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/events/the-briefing-financial-services-virtual-event): The Briefing: Financial Services is a livestreamed event for the executives leading AI transformation at the world's largest financial institutions. Live from N

- [AWS Summit NYC \ Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/events/aws-summit-nyc): At Anthropic, we develop large-scale AI systems, and our research teams help us to create safer, steerable, and more reliable models.

## Research
- [Research \ Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/research): Anthropic is an AI safety and research company that's working to build reliable, interpretable, and steerable AI systems.
- [Teaching Claude why \ Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/research/teaching-claude-why): New research on how we've reduced agentic misalignment
- [Project Glasswing: An initial update \ Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/research/glasswing-initial-update): An early update on what we've learned from Project Glasswing.
- [2028: Two scenarios for global AI leadership \ Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/research/2028-ai-leadership): Our views on the AI competition between the US and China.
- [Clio: Privacy-preserving insights into real-world AI use \ Anthropic](https://www.anthropic.com/research/clio): A blog post describing Anthropic’s new system, Clio, for analyzing how people use AI while maintaining their privacy

## Glasswing
